'''鈭歴-v-h-h''' ('''kasavhehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:espalier|espalier]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:espalier|espalier]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-v-h-h
|-
! Lemma
| kasavhehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisavhehoko|thisavhehoko]] || [[word:jisavhehoko|jisavhehoko]] || [[word:shisavhehoko|shisavhehoko]] || [[word:kisavhehoko|kisavhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusavhehoko|thuthusavhehoko]] || [[word:jujusavhehoko|jujusavhehoko]] || [[word:shushusavhehoko|shushusavhehoko]] || [[word:kukusavhehoko|kukusavhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusavhehoko|thusavhehoko]] || [[word:jusavhehoko|jusavhehoko]] || [[word:shusavhehoko|shusavhehoko]] || [[word:kusavhehoko|kusavhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusavhehoko|thusavhehoko]] || [[word:jusavhehoko|jusavhehoko]] || [[word:shusavhehoko|shusavhehoko]] || [[word:kusavhehoko|kusavhehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesavhehoko|thesavhehoko]] || [[word:jesavhehoko|jesavhehoko]] || [[word:shesavhehoko|shesavhehoko]] || [[word:kesavhehoko|kesavhehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosavhehoko|thothosavhehoko]] || [[word:jojosavhehoko|jojosavhehoko]] || [[word:shoshosavhehoko|shoshosavhehoko]] || [[word:kokosavhehoko|kokosavhehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosavhehoko|thosavhehoko]] || [[word:josavhehoko|josavhehoko]] || [[word:shosavhehoko|shosavhehoko]] || [[word:kosavhehoko|kosavhehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosavhehoko|thosavhehoko]] || [[word:josavhehoko|josavhehoko]] || [[word:shosavhehoko|shosavhehoko]] || [[word:kosavhehoko|kosavhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙savhehoko|th忙savhehoko]] || [[word:j忙savhehoko|j忙savhehoko]] || [[word:sh忙savhehoko|sh忙savhehoko]] || [[word:k忙savhehoko|k忙savhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasavhehoko|thathasavhehoko]] || [[word:jajasavhehoko|jajasavhehoko]] || [[word:shashasavhehoko|shashasavhehoko]] || [[word:kakasavhehoko|kakasavhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasavhehoko|thasavhehoko]] || [[word:jasavhehoko|jasavhehoko]] || [[word:shasavhehoko|shasavhehoko]] || [[word:kasavhehoko|kasavhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasavhehoko|thasavhehoko]] || [[word:jasavhehoko|jasavhehoko]] || [[word:shasavhehoko|shasavhehoko]] || [[word:kasavhehoko|kasavhehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
